suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Complete the 'Build, Test, and Development' section which is currently marked '(To be added once source code is implemented)'. Document the actual build/test commands from services.yaml that workers should use.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-daemon-socket-bug found worker correctly used cargo build --workspace, cargo test, and cargo clippy commands that are in services.yaml but not documented in AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Investigate why rust-worker skill is not found by workers despite .factory/skills/rust/ directory existing with skill content. Skill registration may be broken.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-daemon-socket-bug worker session noted 'The rust-worker skill did not exist' but the skill directory exists.
